standard_terms.definition: Operational definition. Not a dictionary definition. What the agent must do, see, or check when this term applies.

banned_terms.why: Why using this term in this domain misleads the agent or the user.

misunderstandings.wrong: A specific belief a real agent in this domain might hold. NOT a straw-man.
misunderstandings.correct: What the agent should believe instead. Be operational, not slogan.
misunderstandings.key_distinction: Name the conceptual boundary, not just the negation.
misunderstandings.why: What bad output results when an agent holds the wrong belief.
applies_when: describe situations where this misunderstanding is likely
does_not_apply_when: describe situations where this distinction would be a red herring
misunderstandings.failure_risk: What harm if the agent over-applies this distinction outside its scope.

self_check: Domain-specific yes/no question 1 the agent should answer about its own output?
